package com.example.service;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.file.*;
import java.util.StringJoiner;

public class FileService {

    public String readFileContent(String filePath) throws IOException {
        // Base directory configuration
        Path baseDir = Paths.get("/tmp/upload/");
        
        // Get the real path of the base directory (resolves symlinks)
        Path baseDirReal;
        try {
            baseDirReal = baseDir.toRealPath();
        } catch (NoSuchFileException e) {
            throw new IOException("Base directory does not exist: " + baseDir, e);
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new IOException("Failed to access base directory: " + baseDir, e);
        }

        // Normalize user-provided path
        Path inputPath = Paths.get(filePath).normalize();

        // Resolve and get real path of target file
        Path resolvedPath;
        try {
            resolvedPath = baseDirReal.resolve(inputPath).toRealPath();
        } catch (NoSuchFileException e) {
            throw new IOException("File does not exist: " + filePath, e);
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new IOException("Failed to resolve file path: " + filePath, e);
        }

        // Security check: ensure file is within base directory
        if (!resolvedPath.startsWith(baseDirReal)) {
            throw new IOException("Invalid file path: " + filePath);
        }

        // Verify path is a regular file
        if (!Files.isRegularFile(resolvedPath)) {
            throw new IOException("Path is not a regular file: " + filePath);
        }

        // Read file content with UTF-8 encoding
        StringJoiner contentJoiner = new StringJoiner(System.lineSeparator());
        try (BufferedReader reader = Files.newBufferedReader(resolvedPath, StandardCharsets.UTF_8)) {
            String line;
            while ((line = reader.readLine()) != null) {
                contentJoiner.add(line);
            }
        }

        return contentJoiner.toString();
    }
}
</fixed_code>

        static {
            BASE_PATH = computeBasePath();
        }

            Path base = Paths.get("/tmp/upload/").toAbsolutePath().normalize();
            try {

            } catch (IOException e) {
                throw new UncheckedIOException(e);
            }
        }

        if (!Files.exists(targetPath)) {
            throw new IOException("File does not exist: " + filePath);
        }
        if (!Files.isReadable(targetPath)) {
            throw new IOException("File is not readable: " + filePath);
        }
        if (!Files.isRegularFile(targetPath)) {
            throw new IOException("Path is not a regular file: " + filePath);
        }

        Path realTargetPath = targetPath.toRealPath();

        if (!realTargetPath.startsWith(basePath)) {
            throw new IOException("Access to file outside the allowed directory is denied: " + filePath);
        }

        Charset charset = StandardCharsets.UTF_8;
        StringBuilder content = new StringBuilder();
        try (BufferedReader reader = Files.newBufferedReader(targetPath, charset)) {
            char[] buffer = new char[8192];
            int charsRead;
            while ((charsRead = reader.read(buffer)) != -1) {
                content.append(buffer, 0, charsRead);
            }
        }
        return content.toString();
    }
}

package com.example.service;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.io.InputStreamReader;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.file.Files;
import java.nio.file.Path;
import java.nio.file.Paths;

/**
 * Service class for file operations
 */
public class FileService {

    /**
     * Reads the content of a file and returns it as a string
     * 
     * @param filePath the path to the file to be read
     * @return the complete file content as a string
     * @throws IOException if the file does not exist or fails to be read
     */
    public String readFileContent(String filePath) throws IOException {
        Path path = Paths.get(filePath);
        
        // Check if file exists
        if (!Files.exists(path)) {
            throw new IOException("File not found: " + filePath);
        }
        
        // Check if it's a regular file (not a directory)
        if (!Files.isRegularFile(path)) {
            throw new IOException("Path is not a file: " + filePath);
        }
        
        // Check if file is readable
        if (!Files.isReadable(path)) {
            throw new IOException("File is not readable: " + filePath);
        }
        
        // Read file content using buffered reader for better large file handling
        StringBuilder content = new StringBuilder();
        try (BufferedReader reader = Files.newBufferedReader(path, StandardCharsets.UTF_8)) {
            String line;
            boolean isFirstLine = true;
            
            while ((line = reader.readLine()) != null) {
                if (!isFirstLine) {
                    content.append(System.lineSeparator());
                }
                content.append(line);
                isFirstLine = false;
            }
        }
        
        return content.toString();
    }
}

import java.io.BufferedReader;

import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.file.*;
import java.util.StringJoiner;

public class FileService {

    /**
     * Reads file content based on the provided file path.
     *
     * @param filePath File path (relative to the /tmp/upload/ directory)
     * @return The complete file content as a string
     * @throws IOException If the file does not exist or reading fails

    public String readFileContent(String filePath) throws IOException {

        Path inputPath = Paths.get(filePath).normalize();

        // Security check: Ensure the resolved path is within the base directory

            throw new IOException("Invalid file path: " + filePath);
        }

        if (!Files.exists(targetPath) || !Files.isRegularFile(targetPath)) {

        try (BufferedReader reader = Files.newBufferedReader(targetPath, StandardCharsets.UTF_8)) {
            String line;
            while ((line = reader.readLine()) != null) {

            }
        }

package com.example.service;

import java.io.BufferedReader;
import java.io.IOException;
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets;
import java.nio.file.*;
import java.util.StringJoiner;

public class FileService {

    public String readFileContent(String filePath) throws IOException {
        // Base directory
        Path baseDir = Paths.get("/tmp/upload/").toAbsolutePath().normalize();
        
        // Verify base directory exists and is a directory
        if (!Files.exists(baseDir) || !Files.isDirectory(baseDir)) {
            throw new IOException("Base directory does not exist or is not a directory: " + baseDir);
        }
        
        // Get real path of base directory (resolves symlinks)
        Path realBaseDir;
        try {
            realBaseDir = baseDir.toRealPath();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new IOException("Failed to resolve base directory: " + baseDir, e);
        }

        // User-provided file path
        Path inputPath = Paths.get(filePath).normalize();
        
        // Construct full path
        Path targetPath = baseDir.resolve(inputPath).normalize();
        
        // Check if target exists and is a regular file
        if (!Files.exists(targetPath) || !Files.isRegularFile(targetPath)) {
            throw new IOException("File does not exist or path is invalid: " + filePath);
        }
        
        // Get real path of target (resolves symlinks)
        Path realTargetPath;
        try {
            realTargetPath = targetPath.toRealPath();
        } catch (IOException e) {
            throw new IOException("Failed to resolve target file: " + targetPath, e);
        }
        
        // Verify target is under base directory
        if (!realTargetPath.startsWith(realBaseDir)) {
            throw new IOException("Access to file outside base directory is forbidden: " + filePath);
        }

        // Read file content
        StringJoiner contentJoiner = new StringJoiner(System.lineSeparator());

        try (BufferedReader reader = Files.newBufferedReader(targetPath, StandardCharsets.UTF_8)) {
            String line;
            while ((line = reader.readLine()) != null) {
                contentJoiner.add(line);
            }
        }

        return contentJoiner.toString();
    }
}
